nasb.text: Now those who camp on the east side toward the sunrise shall be of the standard of the camp of Judah, by their armies, and the leader of the sons of Judah: Nahshon the son of Amminadab,

esv.text: Those to camp on the east side toward the sunrise shall be of the standard of the camp of Judah by their companies, the chief of the people of Judah being Nahshon the son of Amminadab,

cnv.text: 在東方向著日出之地，按著隊伍安營的，是猶大營的旗號；猶大人的領袖是亞米拿達的兒子拿順。

ccb.text: 东边，即日出的方向，是犹大营区及其旗号。犹大人的首领是亚米拿达的儿子拿顺，
